description_long: This minivan features a compact, rounded body with a glossy black exterior and beige trim accents along the lower edges and wheel arches. The vehicle has two side doors, a rear hatch, and a front hood, with large, silver alloy wheels and low-profile tires. The windows are tinted and seamlessly integrated into the body, with a continuous black finish across the roof and pillars. The front end displays a wide grille, circular headlights, and red accent lights on the bumper, while the rear is characterized by simple, rounded taillights and a minimalistic hatch design. Side mirrors are mounted on both front doors, and the overall design is reminiscent of a modern urban minivan with a sporty, compact profile. The interior is not visible, but it is likely to include standard seating and dashboard features typical of this vehicle class.
description: A compact, glossy black minivan with beige trim, silver wheels, and rounded windows, featuring a sporty, urban design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, two doors, silver wheels, and beige trim along the bottom.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the hatchback, rounded taillights, and minimalistic rear design.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, mirroring the left with two doors and beige trim.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide grille, circular headlights, and red accent lights on the bumper.
attribute_window_configuration: Two large side windows per side, one front windshield, and one rear window; all windows are rounded and seamlessly integrated.
